name: RhoDesign
description: RNA inverse folding: generate sequences predicted to fold into a given 3D RNA structure. Optional secondary structure integration for higher accuracy design. Temperature-controlled sampling for sequence diversity.
capabilities: RNA inverse folding: generate sequences predicted to fold into a given 3D RNA structure
Optional secondary structure integration for higher accuracy design

pdbFile.description: 3D RNA structure in PDB format for inverse folding

secondaryStructure.description: Optional secondary structure in dot-bracket notation for higher accuracy design

numSequences.description: Number of RNA sequences to generate
